response: Batch integration using BBKNN requires cell type annotations to preserve biological variation during correction. None of the target slices (0, 1, 2, 3) have cell type annotations. Please annotate cell types in these slices first using an appropriate method (e.g., reference-based annotation), then retry batch integration.
query_text: Integrate these four brain tissue slices, correcting for batch effects while preserving biological variation.
